proven.claim: PROVEN: the logged Signals count equals contracts.length, which is > 0
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 437
; PROVEN: the logged Signals count equals contracts.length, which is > 0
(declare-const contracts_length Int)
(declare-const signals_logged Int)
; Code transition: contracts = store.getAll(); guard ensures contracts_length > 0
(assert (> contracts_length 0))
; Code transition: console.log(`Signals: ${contracts.length}`) — value is contracts_length
(assert (= signals_logged contracts_length))
; Negated property: signals_logged ≤ 0
(assert (<= signals_logged 0))
(check-sat)
